rulings.Case Title: T&C PROPERTIES, LLC VS. ST. JAMES PROPERTY CO., LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue To Alameda County Superior Court
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 8, 2021 line 1. ST. JAMES PROPERTY CO. LLC'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE TO ALAMEDA COUNTY SUPERIOR COURT is DENIED. Moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that this arbitration was "held" in different counties. No cases interpreting this or similar language cited. Aurandt v. Hire (1959) 175 Cal.App.2d 758 cited in opposition, while not addressing CCP 1292.2 is analogous and persuasive. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: T&C PROPERTIES, LLC VS. ST. JAMES PROPERTY CO., LLC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner T And C Properties, Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion Re Petition To Correct And Confirm Corrected Arbitration Award
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 8, 2021 line 1. PETITIONER T&C PROPERTIES, LLC'S MOTION RE PETITION TO CORRECT AND CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is DENIED as to the correction request. The Court is inclined to confirm arbitration award as is at this time if the parties agree to Court's ruling at this time. Otherwise a new motion to confirm arbitration award shall be filed. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Motion For Leave To Sue Receiver In An Independent Action In Los Angeles County
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 8, 2021 line 2. DEFENDANTS ANNE KIHAGI, JULIA MWANGI, XELAN PROP 1, LLC, RENKA PROP, LLC, NOZARI 2, LLC, ZORIALL, LLC, AND CHRISTINE MWANGI'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO SUE RECEIVER IN AN INDEPENDENT ACTION IN LOS ANGELES COUNTY WHERE THE PARTIES AND THEIR ATTORNEYS NOW RESIDE is GRANTED in part as follows: Defendant may file a complaint against the receiver in this action as to this action's receivership. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL

rulings.Case Title: OASIS GRILL, LLC ET AL VS. ERIC KETCHUM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ketchum Amended Notice Of Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 8, 2021 line 3. KETCHUM'S AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is OFF CALENDAR. Re-noticed for February 16, 2021. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES JADALLAH VS. BEN CANNON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 8, 2021 line 4. DEFENDANT BEN CANNON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for recovery of possession of commercial real property and is not uncertain. =(501/CFH)
